title: ervum glaucum
intro: Ervum glaucum, also known as horse gram, is a type of legume native to the Indian subcontinent and Southeast Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Ervum glaucum include reducing cholesterol levels, managing diabetes, and improving digestion, as well as providing relief from respiratory issues and skin conditions. Ervum glaucum can be prepared as a herbal tea, powder, or extract, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
